scrapeNote: Targeted PR & Marketing scrape — Indeed/CareerBuilder focus on companies hiring/building PR departments
note: Targeted scrape of Indeed.com and CareerBuilder for companies actively hiring PR leadership — strong signal they're building or launching a PR function. All 4 leads are pr-marketing pipeline.

leads.name: SerpApi
leads.notes: FIRST PR HIRE — building PR from scratch. $141K-$183K + profit share for PR Manager. Bootstrapped, $3-6.6M ARR, 38 employees. Customers include Apple, Shopify, Airbnb, GrubHub. They need earned media to grow beyond developer word-of-mouth. Perfect fractional/advisory wedge: help them define the PR strategy before they commit to the full-time hire.

leads.name: PayNearMe
leads.notes: Hiring Senior Director, Brand & Corporate Communications reporting to EVP/CMO. $50M Series E (Sep 2025), $203M total raised, 275 employees. Payment experience management platform. Role covers media relations, analyst engagement, crisis management, thought leadership. Post-raise brand evolution signal — they need the narrative to match the scale. Potential for fractional CMO advisory or agency retainer.

leads.name: Paddle
leads.notes: Hiring Head of Brand & Communications (B2B SaaS) reporting to CMO. $293M total funding, $1.4B valuation, 6000+ SaaS/AI customers. Trying to establish 'revenue delivery' as a category — classic category-creation PR play. Processes $1B+ in payments annually. London HQ but global. Potential for US-side earned media strategy or analyst relations retainer.

leads.name: Loti AI
leads.notes: Hiring PR/marketing role post-$16.2M Series A (Khosla Ventures-led, $23M total). AI deepfake detection for celebrities and consumers. Partnerships with WME, CAA, and 42West/Shore Fire. The deepfake narrative is red-hot — founder profile and thought leadership opportunities are wide open. Celebrity client angle gives this legs beyond tech press into entertainment and policy media.
